events.name: Leeds United at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Diego Gómez scored his first Premier League goals of the season as Brighton romped to a 3-0 win over a desperately poor Leeds at the Amex Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gomez at the double as Brighton beat Leeds

headlines.description: Viktor Gyökeres and Declan Rice struck first-half goals as Arsenal won 2-0 at Burnley to extend their lead at the Premier League's summit and make it nine straight wins in all competitions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal cleansheet run continues in Burnley win

headlines.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta's eighth goal of the season set Crystal Palace on course for a 2-0 victory over Brentford at Selhurst Park that got them back to winning ways in the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mateta on target as Crystal Palace beat Brentford

headlines.description: Winless Wolves slumped to a 3-0 defeat at Fulham to cast huge doubt over the future of boss Vítor Pereira.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pressure grows on Pereira as Fulham beat Wolves

headlines.description: Amad Diallo's delightful volley stopped Ruben Amorim's first anniversary as Manchester United manager from ending in defeat and extended Nottingham Forest's wait for a second Premier League win of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Amad volley sees Utd rescue draw at Forest

headlines.description: João Pedro struck in the 34th minute to help Chelsea inflict more pain on toothless Tottenham with a dominant 1-0 victory to move up to fourth in the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea into third after win over toothless Spurs

headlines.description: Salah and Gravenberch see Liverpool snap losing streak
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah nets 250th Liverpool goal to halt losing run
